name: plumio
description: A self-hosted markdown notes taking app with live preview, document encryption, multi-user support, multi-organization capabilities and more.

scripts.desktop:build: cd frontend && pnpm build:desktop && cd ../desktop && npm run build
scripts.desktop:dev: cd frontend && pnpm build:desktop && cd ../desktop && npm run dev
scripts.desktop:dist:mac: cd frontend && pnpm build:desktop && cd ../desktop && npm run dist:mac
scripts.desktop:dist:win: cd frontend && pnpm build:desktop && cd ../desktop && npm run dist:win
